goal: Enrich Signature synonym coverage and add a persisted approved alias overlay without allowing pending candidates to change deterministic analysis.

steps.name: builtin-synonym-enrichment
steps.summary: Expanded RF, mechanical, test, and symptom aliases in the Signature concept registry.

steps.name: persisted-approved-alias-overlay
steps.summary: Added signatureAliasDictionary persistence, API routes, resolver overlay merge, and Chat approval action for pending alias candidates.

steps.name: verification-and-record
steps.summary: Added smoke coverage and updated docs/test/phase records.
